creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 151544
The new port www/pecl-http1

pecl-http 2.1.4 has landed in ports but this breaks all existing code using pecl-http version 1

As per http://pecl.php.net/package-info.php?package=pecl_http&version=2.0.0dev2
This is to become v2 of the known pecl_http extension.
It is completely incompatible to previous version.
Try it, or let it be. If you are not sure, let it be. Really.

Probably should have an UPDATING entry as well.
